name: Big Swing Golf Sim
about: Big Swing Golf Sim is an indoor entertainment venue located in Windham, Maine, offering high-quality golf simulators and activities suitable for the whole family. The facility features over 1000 courses from around the country, providing a variety of gameplay options beyond traditional golf, including a multipart arcade mode, putting green, and darts. The venue is designed to be more than just an arcade, positioning itself as a space for both practice and social entertainment. The atmosphere is casual and welcoming, catering to those looking to practice their swing or enjoy a fun day out. Pricing is accessible with options for bulk hour discounts and monthly memberships, and guests can reserve bays online. The venue emphasizes safety and care for the equipment, maintaining a family-friendly environment in the surrounding area.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 1000 global golf courses
Variety of entertainment beyond golf including darts and arcade modes
Family-friendly environment with food and beverage options
Putting green and practice areas available

food_and_drink.notes: Food and beverage service available, with designated tables provided; strict policy against food/drink inside the simulator bays.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-quality golf simulators specified on website.

pricing_model: Hourly rentals with bulk discount packages (Buy 5/10/20 hours) and monthly memberships.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the text does not explicitly state rentals, equipment is provided in the bay (balls and tees). Call ahead to confirm club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, food and drinks must be kept at the provided tables. No food or drink is allowed inside the simulator or near the computer.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as fun for the whole family and offers arcade modes suitable for all ages.
